title: Hexpats
description: A small addon for Hex Casting that adds patterns to interact with Paucal headpats.
body:
A small addon for Hexcasting that adds patterns to interact with Paucal headpats.

Adds two new patterns under the "comforts" pattern category.

-Patter's Gambit:
Pops the entity at the top of the stack and headpats it.

-Patter's Purification:
Pops an entity and returns whether it is on fire.

Requires Hex Casting and Fabric
